title: Procedural Description Generation
scenario: Write a procedural description of a fictional character's background, including their childhood, education, and career. The description should be written in a formal, third-person perspective and should include specific details about the character's personality, skills, and motivations. Limit the output to 200 words.
constraints: Must be written in the third person
Must include specific details about the character's personality, skills, and motivations

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the tone is formal and third-person.
Evaluate the accuracy and consistency of the character's background and personality traits.
Check if the output meets all the constraints (specific details, word limit).
